title: SMTP
helpOutput:
Usage: smtp [<options>] <domain>

  Test SMTP connectivity and STARTTLS behavior.

Options:
  --json               Output results in JSON format
  -s, --server=<text>  DNS server to query (default: system resolver)
  -t, --timeout=<int>  Query timeout in seconds
  -p, --port=<int>     SMTP port (default: 25)
  -h, --help           Show this message and exit

Arguments:
  <domain>  Domain name to test SMTP for (resolves MX records)
